/usr/bin/ar qc libz-ng.a "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/generic/adler32_c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/generic/adler32_fold_c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/generic/crc32_braid_c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/crc32_braid_comb.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/deflate.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/deflate_fast.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/deflate_huff.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/deflate_medium.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/deflate_quick.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/deflate_rle.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/deflate_slow.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/deflate_stored.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/functable.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/infback.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/inflate.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/inftrees.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/insert_string.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/insert_string_roll.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/trees.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/uncompr.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/zutil.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/generic/crc32_chorba_c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/cpu_features.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/x86_features.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/chunkset_sse2.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/chorba_sse2.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/compare256_sse2.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/slide_hash_sse2.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/adler32_ssse3.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/chunkset_ssse3.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/chorba_sse41.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/adler32_sse42.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/crc32_pclmulqdq.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/slide_hash_avx2.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/chunkset_avx2.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/compare256_avx2.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/adler32_avx2.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/adler32_avx512.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/chunkset_avx512.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/compare256_avx512.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/adler32_avx512_vnni.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/arch/x86/crc32_vpclmulqdq.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/gzlib.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/gzread.c.o" "CMakeFiles/zlib-ng.dir/gzwrite.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libz-ng.a
